name: Syracuse, NY
author: PSWBSF
description:
Map of Syracuse, New York. Made using the Map Patcher by Kronifer and US Demand Generator by slurry.

Uses 2023 LODES data and includes additional demand data as follows:

Airports

  • Syracuse Hancock International Airport (SYR)

Universities

  • Syracuse University (not listed as a college campus in game)

  • Le Moyne College

  • Onondaga Community College

Entertainment/Tourism

  • Museum of Science & Technology

  • Rosamond Gifford Zoo

Stadiums

  • JMA Wireless Dome

Shopping

  • Destiny USA

  • Shoppingtown Mall

Military Bases

  • Hancock Field Air National Guard Base
